title: Cron Explainer
description: Parse a standard 5-field cron expression into a human-readable description and list the next run times; supports */ , - steps, month/weekday aliases, and DOM∨DOW semantics.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: Parsing and next-run computation run entirely in your browser; times use your local timezone and nothing is uploaded.

input.label: Cron expression (min hour dom month dow)

runs.heading: Next runs
runs.none: No matching run within about a year.
